DECLARATION OF RICHARD J. DE BERNARDO REL RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF DI BERNARDO, CPA, RICHARD J.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-23-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-23-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ESTATE OF FLORENCE GIANNINI WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH RONALD GIANNI (TITLE: PRESIDENT). THE DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BURGLAR ALARM COMPANY WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH RONALD GIANNI (TITLE: PRESIDENT). THE DEFENDANTS WAIVE UNTIMELY SERVICE. THE DEFENDANT FLORENCE GIANNINI WAS NEVER SERVED. THE PLAINTIFF WANTED TO PROCEED WITHOUT THAT DEFENDANT. DISMISSED AS TO THE DEFENDANT FLORENCE GIANNINI. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
